capabilities.name: Code Execution
capabilities.description: Ability to execute shell commands, scripts, or code

capabilities.name: Filesystem Access
capabilities.description: Ability to read, write, move, or delete files

capabilities.name: Network Access
capabilities.description: Ability to make outbound HTTP or other network requests

capabilities.name: Authentication
capabilities.description: Ability to verify caller identity before granting access

capabilities.name: Authorization
capabilities.description: Ability to enforce scoped permissions and role boundaries

capabilities.name: Data Store Access
capabilities.description: Ability to query, read, and write to databases
